subcodes.first_line: O thou candle of the love of God! Thy letter was received. Its contents were of lofty significance and bore witness to steadfastness and firmness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع محبت الله نامه شما رسید محتوای نامه معانی جلیله بود و دلیل بر ثبوت و رسوخ
subcodes.subjects: @music and singing, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
